summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO Arena UX/UI fixes for header and components. All key requirements verified successfully.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 400 instead of expected 404 for invalid position ID
minor_bugs.impact: Minor validation inconsistency, doesn't affect core functionality

passed_tests: FOMO Engine stats, signals, and events APIs working
Header displays correctly with proper element hierarchy
Connect Wallet button has primary (dark) styling
Create Market button has secondary (outline) styling
Q1 2026 LIVE badge has 6px border radius (not pill-shaped)
Sort by buttons (Trending, Newest, Volume, Most Bets) have unified 6px rounding
Search positioned correctly in header between navigation and buttons
All navigation tabs have proper 6px border radius styling
Unified 6px border radius standard implemented across platform
